title: Glowing Ores
body:
## Glowing
 **Optifine must be installed for the resource pack to work!**

## Glow block
- Diamond Ore and deepslate version
- Iron Ore and deepslate version
- Coal ore and deepslate version
- Emerald Ore and deepslate version
- Gold Ore and deepslate version
- Redstone Ore and deepslate version
- Lapis Lazuli Ore and deepslate version
- Copper Ore and deepslate version
- Nether Gold Ore
- Nether Quartz Ore
- Ancient Debris

![Glowing Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UdM7EYgj/images/8fcda9e7e511f7e61d33f57c0d8b279942034d70.png)
